reference: My doctor believes I have stage one lung cancer, and I am set to have a positron emission tomography scan in a few weeks to verify it. I was wondering how long it takes, on average, to progress to stage two, stage three, or stage four? I am seventy years old and otherwise in quite healthy condition. The cancer was found quite by accident after having a chest X-ray following a car accident.
text: My doctor believes I have stage 1 lung cancer, and I am set to have a positron emission tomography scan in a few weeks to verify it. I was wondering how long it takes, on average, to progress to stage 2, stage 3, or stage 4. I am 70 years old and otherwise in quite healthy condition. The cancer was found, quite by accident, after having a chest X-ray following a car accident.
